title: Proclamation No. 330, s. 2003
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 330

DECLARING FRIDAY, MARCH 21, 2003, AS A SPECIAL DAY IN THE CITY OF VICTORIAS, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL

WHEREAS, Friday, March 21, 2003, marks the 5 th Charter Day anniversary of the City of Victorias into a component city of Negros Occidental;

WHEREAS, it is fitting and proper that the people of the City of Victorias be given full opportunity to celebrate this milestone in their city’s history with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, ALBERTO G. ROMULO, Executive Secretary, by order of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO, do hereby declare Friday, March 21, 2003, as a special day in the City of Victorias, Negros Occidental.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 14 th day of February, in the year of Our Lord, two thousand and three.

By order of the President: (Sgd.) ALBERTO G. ROMULO Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary: (Sgd.) JOAQUIN C. LAGONERA Senior Deputy Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
